title: Add inverse_transform to KernelPCA / IncrementalPCA / NMF / TruncatedSVD / FactorAnalysis
description:
sklearn provides inverse_transform on the linear-projection decomposition family. ferrolearn currently has it only on FittedPCA. Add to:
- FittedKernelPCA (only when fit_inverse_transform=True; sklearn pattern)
- FittedIncrementalPCA (same formula as PCA)
- FittedNMF (W @ H reconstruction)
- FittedTruncatedSVD (X @ V_k @ V_k.T reconstruction)
- FittedFactorAnalysis (Λ @ z reconstruction)
